name: Raisin-Walnut Stuffing [for a 12-pound Turke
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer raisins in water in a small saucepan for 1 minute; reserve.
2. Sauté celery and onion in butter or margarine until soft in a large skillet. Stir in chicken broth, salt, sage, and pepper.
3. Add bread cubes and walnuts to the large bowl; add raisin-water mixture; toss lightly until evenly moist.
Makes approximately 10 cups.
Source: Family Circle Illustrated Library of Cooking
